Package graphics

Interface Movable

All Known Implementing Classes:
AppleFruit, Balken, BananaFruit, Bar, BlueBerryFruit, GameOver, GraphicElement, Projectile, RectangleGraphicElement, Snake, SpaceShip, SpriteGraphicElement, SquareGraphicElement
public interface Movable

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type Method Description
    void move()
    This function uses the object intrinsic parameters for moving the object
    void move​(int x, int y)
    this function uses the given parameters for moving the object

  • Method Details

    • move

      void move()
      This function uses the object intrinsic parameters for moving the object

    • move

      void move​(int x, int y)
      this function uses the given parameters for moving the object
      Parameters:
      x - the amount the object should be moved in x-direction
      y - the amount the object should be moved in y-direction
